---
title: "Gendreau Lab Research Hub"
subtitle: "Web-based predictive calculators for neurosurgical outcomes research"
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
## Translating clinical data into usable neurosurgical research tools

The Gendreau Lab develops web-based calculators that translate registry-scale clinical data into accessible research tools. This site serves as a central home for deployed predictive calculators and related model documentation.

[View calculators](calculators.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [Contact](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

## Research areas

- Neuro-oncology outcomes and survival prediction
- Registry-based neurosurgical epidemiology
- Clinical informatics and model-assisted abstraction
- Web-based calculator development and deployment

## Research-use disclaimer

The calculators and materials on this site are intended for research and educational use. They are not medical devices and are not a substitute for professional medical judgment, multidisciplinary discussion, or individualized patient counseling.
